name: higson
description: Operate a Higson BRMS through its Studio MCP server — read/change/test/publish decision tables, functions, domain, flows. Ships the Higson skill and wires up the Higson MCP server.

studio_url.title: Higson Studio MCP URL
studio_url.description: MCP URL of your Studio instance, e.g. http://localhost:8282/api/mcp or https://your-instance/api/mcp

token.title: Studio integration token
token.description: Integration token generated in Higson Studio (least-privilege user). Use a scoped token, not admin.
